profile.archetype: Space Systems Engineer transitioning to Founder

current_role.title: Space Systems Engineer
current_role.focus: Lunar rover development and system-level engineering

strengths: ability to operate in high-complexity environments
weaknesses: not yet deep in a single technical niche (e.g., propulsion, comms, autonomy)
limited experience owning full system architecture end-to-end
AI systems knowledge mostly at application level

interests: AI as an enabler for physical systems
unfair_advantages: direct experience inside space industry (Skyloom, ispace)
exposure to both communications and lunar systems
ability to understand real constraints of space hardware
system-level perspective across software and hardware
early founder initiative within the same domain
constraints: limited exposure to market dynamics (especially government / defense procurement)
limited direct experience with customers and revenue generation
still transitioning from contributor to full system owner
balancing full-time engineering role with founder exploration

knowledge: government procurement processes (RFPs, contracts, funding flows)
how space companies sell to agencies and defense
budget structures and buying triggers in space industry
experience: closing deals or participating in sales cycles
defining products based on market demand

ideal_startups.entry_strategy: software or data-driven wedge into space ecosystem
characteristics: solves a specific operational or data problem
potential to expand into deeper tech over time

anti_patterns: jumping directly into capital-intensive deep-tech without market validation
building without clear customer or buyer
pure software ideas disconnected from real-world impact
current_focus: exploring intersections of space systems and software
next_steps: gain exposure to business development and customer side within space industry
study real contracts and procurement processes (NASA, JAXA, ESA)
validate at least one idea with a real potential customer
take ownership of a larger system or problem internally
profile.long_term_goal: found or lead a space technology company with real-world deployment, combining strong technical systems with clear market demand
